title: OCI Off-Hours Administrative Activity
description: Surfaces administrative API calls occurring outside business hours (evenings, weekends), which may indicate unauthorized access or compromised accounts.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('Event Type' like '*create*' or 'Event Type' like '*delete*' or 'Event Type' like '*update*') | eval hour = formatDate(Time, 'HH') | eval day = formatDate(Time, 'E') | where hour < '06' or hour > '22' or day = 'Sat' or day = 'Sun' | stats count as actions by 'Principal Name', day, hour | sort -actions
notes: Adjust business hours thresholds for your timezone. Exclude known automation/service accounts.
